title: Sellable Status
description: Sellable Status v1 contract. Sellable requires released batch, warehouse receipt confirmed, inventory ledger pass, stock available, HSD valid, QC clear, trace ready, no recall, and no sale lock.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 Sellable Gate and PACK-02 Product Activation dependency. TODO: exact sellable decision status taxonomy is not fully specified.

batch_released.description: True when batch release is complete.

warehouse_receipt_confirmed.description: True when warehouse receipt is confirmed.

inventory_ledger_pass.description: True when ledger supports the stock state.

stock_available.description: True when available stock is greater than zero and not held.

hsd_valid.description: True when shelf life/HSD is valid.

quality_hold.description: True when quality hold blocks sellable.

recall_hold.description: True when recall hold blocks sellable.

sale_lock.description: True when sale lock blocks sellable.

trace_ready.description: True when trace chain is ready.
